heroInsight: Darc Sport's recent collabs are driving the highest engagement, with top post by @annettevasquezzz hitting 1,771 likes and an overall engagement score of 1831.

formatPerformance.summary: Carousel posts are currently dominating, with their save rates and swipe-through engagement outpacing static posts. Despite sparse Reel data, Reels remain crucial for video content and potential reach.

data.name: Reel
data.note: Reels maintain high potential reach due to first 3 seconds retention criticality and algorithmic favoritism despite sparse specific data.

data.name: Carousel
data.note: Carousels have a significant edge given their 2.5x better engagement than single posts and high save rates.

data.name: Story
data.note: Stories hold steady importance for real-time engagement; estimate based on usual trends and indirect data.

data.name: Static
data.note: Static posts lag behind carousels and Reels, with lower engagement and save rates.

critical: DM shares (sends per reach) are 3-5x more valuable than likes.
Saves account for 25% of content ranking power.
Shares via DM contribute 20% to ranking power.
First 3 seconds retention is crucial for Reels reach.
Originality score: 10+ reposts in 30 days results in shadowban.
proTips: Post carousels at 14:00 for optimal engagement; data shows highest average interactions.
Include 'save this' CTAs in the third slide of carousels to boost saves.
Leverage Darc Sport's current trend by integrating brand-specific hashtags.
Use transformation stories with dramatic audio like 'Clair de Lune' for emotional impact.
Promote gym fit checks during peak evening hours for maximum visibility.

tiktokCrossover.summary: High-engagement TikTok trends that haven't fully translated to Instagram yet.
